title: OO EE A E A
description: Cats will now spin like the viral tiktok video
body:
Cats will randomly spin like the TikTok viral video that attacts cats and play the OO EE A E A sound. They can spin with the fast spin sound or the slow spin sound.

This mod is client side only.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XAb85Mz48z8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
